detail.description:
【Collect 100+ Unique Tataris!】
Forget generic designs! Collect them all in just 1 month—from the goofy Frugling to the sassy Solpear!

【Evolve to Power Up!】
Reach formidable Tier 4 evolutions and unlock rare Glitter forms! How many can you get?

【Strategy-Based Battles】
Mix and match formations to discover powerful combos! Crush the Zobo waves with your strategic genius!

【Build Your Tatari Paradise】
Craft a cozy home and interact with your pets— what happens if you drop Frostnip in the pool?
detail.recentChanges: Clash of Critters is now live!: Your Virtual Pet Paradise is Here!
